title: Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator

'''''Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator''''' is the fourth adventure book in the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]]. It was published by [[Scholastic]] in [[December]] [[1997]].

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''The Imperial Star Destroyer ''Liquidator'' is quickly approaching the Rebel base on Yavin Four. It is part of an Imperial plan to control hyperspace—and crush the Rebellion. To prevent the Empire from carrying out this evil deed, the Rebels must locate the Imperial forces without being discovered. Your mission: to stop the ''Liquidator''…and get out of Yavin Four alive!''

''May the Force be with you.''

==Plot summary==
*Mission Type: Rebel
The [[Liquidator (Imperial II-class)|''Liquidator'']] arrives in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]], and begins scouting the habitable moons in the area, starting with [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]]. Meanwhile, the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] enters the area and prepares to destroy an Imperial probe sent to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. It does so, and Captain [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] transmits a fake message to the ''Liquidator'', claiming that Yavin 4 is clear.

Meanwhile, Captain [[Skeezer]] escapes from his cell in the [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi temple]], and hijacks his Carrack Cruiser. As he leaves, he fires on the ''Millennium Falcon'', forcing it to land. The Rebels realize that they must stop Skeezer before he reaches the ''Liquidator''.

Along with [[Q-7N]], a Rebel sets off after Skeezer in a Rebel starfighter. Skeezer is forced to land on Yavin 8, where he attempts to contact the recently established Imperial garrison there. The Rebel, however, destroys the garrison, but is captured by the ''Liquidator''. On board the Imperial Star Destroyer, the Rebel escapes with the aid of Sevenen, and destroys the ship. Skeezer is killed in the process, but [[Termo]] and [[Tix]] escape. The Rebel returns to Yavin 4 and celebrates.
